title: The Mirror's Shadow
summary: Leo buys a mysterious old mirror for his room suddenly.
coverScene: A young man stands in a cozy bedroom with warm lighting, looking curiously at a large, beautiful mirror with a dark wooden frame.

sentences.text: Leo had recently moved into a large, quiet house that was situated near the edge of an old, historic town.
He wanted to find some unique furniture, so he visited a small shop where various beautiful things were sold cheap.
A large mirror with a dark wooden frame immediately caught his eye because it looked extremely ancient and special.
If he had known about the mirror's strange history, he probably would have chosen a different object for his bedroom.
However, he bought it without delay and hung it on the wall directly opposite his comfortable new bed.
That first evening, the glass reflected his room perfectly, showing nothing but the clean floor and his own happy face.
During the first night, Leo woke up suddenly because the air in his bedroom had become surprisingly cold and thin.
He sat up in bed, opened his eyes, and looked at the large mirror which was shining under the moon.
In the reflection, he noticed a dark shadow sitting quietly on a wooden chair that was placed near the window.
However, when he turned his head to look at the actual room, he realized that no such chair existed there.
The shadow in the mirror did not move, but its presence made him feel an intense sense of deep worry.
He tried to convince himself that it was merely a strange effect caused by the trees outside his window.
On the second night, Leo watched the mirror carefully before he decided to turn off the light near his bed.
When he woke up during the night, he immediately looked at the glass to see if the figure was still there.
The shadow was indeed there, but it was no longer sitting on the silent chair near the far wall.
Instead, the dark figure was now standing, having taken one clear step forward toward the center of the reflected room.
If the shadow had been a real person, Leo would have heard the sound of steps on the wooden floor.
But the bedroom remained completely silent, which only made the growing situation seem much more frightening and real to him.
By the third night, the shadow had taken another step, moving closer to the bed where Leo lay awake.
He decided that he must remove the mirror from his bedroom, believing that this action would solve his terrible problem.
He tried to pull the heavy frame off the wall, but it was held by some strange, unknown force.
No matter how hard he pulled, the mirror would not move, as if it had become part of the house.
He felt a sudden panic rising in his chest, realizing that he was completely unable to escape this bad dream.
He covered the glass with a thick white sheet, hoping that he would not have to look at it again.
However, when he woke up during the fourth night, the sheet was lying on the floor, completely dry and clean.
It was as if some hands had gently removed the cover while he was sleeping deeply in his bed.
He looked into the mirror and saw that the shadow had taken two more steps, standing right in the middle.
The figure, which was dark and had no clear face, was now staring directly at him through the glass.
Leo wanted to run out of the house, but his legs felt extremely heavy, as if they were made of stone.
He could only lie there, watching the shadow that seemed to grow larger and more dangerous with every passing minute.
The next morning, Leo visited the local library to find some information about the old house and its previous owners.
He read through several old books and records, hoping to discover the origin of the terrible mirror he had bought.
He discovered that a young man had once lived in his bedroom many decades ago, before disappearing without a trace.
According to the reports, the young man had spent his last days staring into the same large, dark mirror.
If the young man had destroyed the mirror, he would probably have survived his terrible experience and remained alive.
This discovery filled Leo with a deep fear, as he realized that the same thing was currently happening to him.
When the fifth night arrived, Leo decided to stay awake, keeping all the lights in his bedroom turned on.
However, late at night, every single light in the house suddenly went out, leaving his room in complete and heavy darkness.
In the mirror, which seemed to have its own cold light, the shadow was standing at the very edge.
It was so close that it seemed ready to step out of the glass and enter his real room.
Leo could hear a quiet, cold whisper that seemed to come directly from the other side of the glass.
The whisper was calling his name, over and over, with a voice that was both quiet and extremely ancient.
On the sixth night, Leo knew that he had run out of time and could no longer avoid the shadow.
The dark figure in the mirror had finally reached the absolute front, its hands pressed against the glass surface.
Suddenly, the glass did not look solid anymore; instead, it began to move like water under a gentle wind.
A cold, dark hand slowly emerged from the mirror, reaching out toward Leo who was frozen with extreme fear.
If he had run away on the first day, he would have been safe from this terrible house.
But now, the cold fingers touched his skin, and he felt himself being pulled slowly into the dark reflection.
The next day, the house was completely empty, and the local police could find no trace of the young man.
His bed was completely empty, and the beautiful mirror was still hanging on the wall, shining in the morning light.
A few weeks later, all of Leo's furniture was sold to a local shop that dealt in old, interesting items.
Another customer, who had just moved into a new apartment nearby, bought the large mirror with the wooden frame.
If she knew what was waiting inside the glass, she would certainly have left the mirror in the shop.
But she smiled, took it home, and hung it in her bedroom, where a dark shadow was already waiting.

quiz.q: Why did Leo buy the mirror?
options: He liked its dark wooden frame and ancient look.
He needed it to cover a hole in his bedroom wall.
A friend recommended that he buy it from the shop.

quiz.q: What did Leo find out at the local library?
options: The mirror was once owned by a famous local artist.
A young man who owned the mirror had disappeared decades ago.
The house was built on an ancient town cemetery.

quiz.q: What happened on the sixth night?
options: The police arrived just in time to save Leo.
Leo successfully broke the mirror with a heavy object.
A cold hand emerged from the mirror and pulled Leo inside.

quiz.q: Where did Leo hang the large mirror he bought?
options: On the wall directly opposite his comfortable bed.
Near the window next to an old wood chair.
In the quiet living room near the front door.

options: He moved the mirror into another room of the house.
He covered the glass with a thick white sheet.
